prompt: Create a luxury skincare campaign collage in a 4 by 3 editorial grid with exactly 12 tiles, using a warm ivory, cream, champagne, and soft beige palette. The overall mood is ultra-refined, minimal, sensual, and high-end, with milky diffused lighting, soft cinematic shadows, glossy hydrated skin, and a premium beauty magazine aesthetic. Tile 1: a frosted glass skincare pump bottle standing on a clear shelf, matte cream body, metallic gold pump and collar, elegant serif branding reading BLOOMGLOW, product name reading RADIANCE MOISTURIZING EMULSION, photographed against a creamy beige wall with diagonal sunlight. Tile 2: a macro swipe of thick white lotion on a smooth cream surface, sculptural texture, soft highlights. Tile 3: a close crop of a woman's head and neck from behind, dark hair in a clean low bun, luminous skin, ear visible, minimal composition. Tile 4: sheer cream curtains lit by sunlight with the shadow silhouette of leaves or flowers cast across them. Tile 5: close-up of a woman's bare shoulder and upper back, dewy glowing skin, one hand touching the shoulder, a thin streak of lotion trailing down the back, intimate skincare editorial framing. Tile 6: a glossy translucent droplet of emulsion resting on a creamy matte surface, macro product texture study. Tile 7: a close crop of the lower face, jawline, neck, and collarbone of the same woman, fingers gently touching the neck, fresh hydrated glow, soft shadow. Tile 8: another macro smear of white cream, smoother and broader than tile 2, with reflective wet highlights. Tile 9: sunlit rippling water in pale champagne tones, abstract liquid texture with sparkling reflections. Tile 10: the same skincare bottle lying diagonally on softly wrinkled satin or silk fabric, gentle sunlight, subtle shadow, branding visible. Tile 11: close-up of hands applying a white oval dollop of lotion onto the back of one hand with the fingertips of the other hand, elegant manicured natural nails. Tile 12: glossy neckline and shoulders of the woman, collarbones highlighted, luminous moisturized skin, dark hair partially visible at the top edge. Keep the composition clean and balanced with thin white dividers between all 12 panels. Style keywords: minimalist luxury, creamy soft light, premium cosmetic advertisement, tactile textures, hydration, skin radiance, cinematic beauty editorial, understated opulence, breathable moisture glow. No clutter, no bright colors, no props beyond bottle, fabric, water, curtains, and skincare textures.
